commit.message:
feat(email): sync daily quotas from provider APIs before sending

Replace in-memory-only counters with real usage data from each
provider's API at the start of every cascade run:
- Mailgun: GET /v3/{domain}/stats/total?event=accepted&duration=1d
- Mailjet: GET /v3/REST/statcounters (daily resolution)
- Unosend: GET /v1/emails (filter by today's date)
- Resend: GET /emails (filter by today's date)

This ensures accurate quota tracking across separate workflow runs
instead of relying on 429 responses to detect exhausted limits.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add refresh_cache() adoption contract + post-install verification

The main purpose of wincoman is to register unmanaged apps with a
package manager so that manager can track and upgrade them. Running
'winget install' or 'choco install' IS the adoption mechanism: both
tools write their own tracking metadata on install, so the app appears
in 'winget list' (Source: winget) or 'choco list' thereafter.

Changes:
- base.py: Add refresh_cache() abstract method to InstallablePackageManager.
  Documents that install() is the adoption mechanism and refresh_cache()
  must be called afterwards to make the change immediately visible.
- winget.py: Implement refresh_cache() — clears self._cache so the next
  is_managed() call re-queries 'winget list'.
- chocolatey.py: Implement refresh_cache() — clears self._cache so the
  next is_managed() call re-queries 'choco list'.
- installer.py: After mgr.install() succeeds, call mgr.refresh_cache()
  then verify via mgr.is_managed(app_name). If still untracked, log a
  warning so the user knows adoption may need a manual update cycle.
- Tests: refresh_cache clears cache in winget + choco; installer calls
  refresh_cache after success; warning logged when is_managed still
  False; no warning when adoption confirmed; ABC enforces refresh_cache.

339 tests passing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

perf(maglev): true-inline array store + IC-preserving fast path

Zero-call inline fast path for keyed stores of Smi and Boolean values:
on IC hit (same array, in bounds), write discriminant + payload bytes
directly to the element memory without any Rust function call.

Critically, in-bounds stores no longer invalidate the array IC slot.
Previously every StaKeyedProperty zeroed the IC handle, forcing the
next LdaKeyedProperty through the slow path.  Now only out-of-bounds
stores (which may cause Vec reallocation) invalidate the cache.

Added mov_store_dword_base_disp32 and mov_store_byte_imm_base_disp32
instructions to the x86-64 macro assembler for field-level writes.

Expected impact: sieve_primes benchmark (tight load/store loop on
boolean arrays) should improve dramatically since load IC now stays
valid across iterations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(capture): publish dashboard snapshots atomically

Avoid serving partially written BMP files by publishing versioned
snapshots through a manifest that current and previous aliases
resolve through.

This keeps change detection and image-region extraction aligned
with the latest published image while pruning stale snapshots
over time.

Implement wall slide ability

- Added wall detection probes (checkWallLeft/checkWallRight) in PhysicsComponent
- When airborne and pressing into a wall with WallSlide ability unlocked,
  the player slowly slides down at a capped speed (60 px/s)
- Air jumps reset when wall slide begins
- Wall jump pushes player away from wall and upward
- Added wall-slide-left and wall-slide-right animations (rows 5-6 in sprite sheet)
- Animation state logic updated to show wall slide sprites when sliding

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: child node rename fails — dialog guard + default text + confirm fallback

Three root causes fixed:
1. document Delete handler fires while rename dialog input loses focus,
   deleting the node mid-rename. Guard: skip if .mm-msg-overlay is present.
2. addChild passed text='' causing rename dialog to open with empty input;
   user pressing Enter triggered silent !newText return. Now uses '子节点'.
3. Root node placement also used text=''; now uses addNode default '新节点'.
4. confirm() no longer silent-fails on empty input; falls back to existing
   node text (n.text || '节点') so rename always completes.
